title: Advanced Animals
description: A Mod That Changes Animal AI To Be Super Smart Aswell As Adding Reputation
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa1e3ee6a7dbf8ec3b1ee4474553ec30ccfc2e96.png)

Welcome to advanced animals! In this mod all animals have advanced AI and an entire reputation system. this mod is very much in early beta but I plan on adding more stuff soon.

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/895d4e6f650f22111e893b4a64cf7b8d7c2dc4e3.png)

**AI**
**Animals will now run** when they sense danger for example when one of their herd members are hit they all panic making it harder to attack them head on. This will inspire a more sneaky and **realistic hunting aproach**.

**Reputation**
Everytime you attack a peaceful creature it will give you **-1 reputation**. When your reputation is below 0, all peacefull creatures will run from you and wolves will attack you on sight making it realy hard to play the game.

**Gaining Reputation**
You can **gain back reputation** by placing wheat, seeds or potatos on the ground via right click. This will then attract whatever mob likes the food and when they come and eat it they will leave you a gift. There are **3 different gifts** you can get and when right clicked they give you **+1 reputation**. Another new item added by the mod is the **Nature orb**. This orb lets you view your reputation with the animals. **At 50 reputation** you will gain the ability to tame any tamable mob just by being near them.
